overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city intersection at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, passing futuristic vehicles, and street vendors. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with reflective wet surfaces and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

events.description: futuristic black sedan passes from right to left across the intersection
white sports car speeds past from left to right across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wide wet intersection, navigating between passing vehicles while heading toward the towering neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving across the intersection from right to left
white sports car speeding past from left to right

tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and vertical neon accents
elevated walkway connecting buildings with glowing yellow railings
multiple large digital advertisements displaying animated brand imagery
tropical tree with green foliage situated on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection at night, with the camera walking across broad yellow crosswalk stripes. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt while towering glass skyscrapers with holographic billboards rise in the background. An overhead pedestrian bridge spans the street ahead, and palm trees line the sidewalk edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical canyon view of skyscrapers and overhead structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the sky and upper building facades
camera tilts back down to street level

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering architecture, examining the neon signs and overhead walkways between skyscrapers

entered.detail: dark night sky visible between the towering skyscrapers overhead
illuminated brand signage mounted high on building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera pans upward to reveal the vertical canyon of skyscrapers, showing the night sky between buildings and the intricate network of overhead walkways and neon signage. The perspective emphasizes the scale of the architecture before tilting back down to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon-lit food vendor stalls

events.description: turns right onto the sidewalk leaving the main intersection behind
enters semi-covered area with purple neon food stalls and industrial overhead structures

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past pedestrians and food vendors, moving under the building overhangs

notable_agents.action: person wearing a hat and jacket walking toward the camera
group of people gathered near the purple-lit food stalls

entered.detail: large cyan illuminated sign reading NIGHT CITY mounted on the building facade
street vendor stall with glowing purple lighting and white umbrellas
large ventilation fans mounted on the overhead building structure
reflective glass doors and windows of the commercial building

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a sidewalk passing under building overhangs, entering a semi-covered pedestrian area. A large NIGHT CITY sign glows on the left while food stalls with distinctive purple neon lighting line the right side. Pedestrians walk along the wet concrete path, and large industrial ventilation fans are visible overhead as the camera moves deeper into the covered walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, rain-slicked urban intersection into the dense, neon-lit corridors of a pedestrian walkway. It begins by crossing broad yellow stripes on wet asphalt, moving past futuristic vehicles and palm trees beneath the shadow of towering glass skyscrapers and holographic billboards. As the camera pans upward, the view expands into a vertical canyon of architecture, revealing a network of overhead walkways and neon signage against the night sky before tilting back down to street level. The perspective then shifts toward the sidewalk, passing under building overhangs to enter a semi-covered area where a glowing Night City sign and purple-lit food stalls line the path. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the pedestrian zone, gliding past strolling citizens and large industrial ventilation fans overhead.
